channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-16
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting progress recently, with notable updates to both the scienceverse/metacheck and JamieCummins/regcheck projects. In metacheck, the main branch has been updated with new module names in vignettes, a revised DESCRIPTION, and merged pull requests, while the dev branch has added a zenodo citation and explored new ideas for z-curve and grim. Meanwhile, regcheck has focused on its staging branch, enhancing features such as pdf report handling, file viewing, and model requirements. It's great to see these projects advancing and potentially informing one another, such as metacheck's work on module updates and regcheck's improvements to report viewing. Overall, our community is making strides in developing robust research tools, and we look forward to seeing the continued impact of these projects.

90 commits across 5 active repositories this week.

New releases: metacheck v0.1.0-beta

Most active:

metacheck34 commits
docpluck26 commits
regcheck21 commits
coarse8 commits
auto-zcurve1 commits

item.title: metacheck: 4 commits today
item.description:
scienceverse/metacheck

Work was done on the 'main', 'new_modules', and 'dev' branches. On the 'main' branch, the module names in vignettes were updated, the DESCRIPTION was updated to fix #313, and two pull requests (#312 and #311) were merged from the 'dev' branch. The 'new_modules' branch saw an update to fix #313 and an exploration of ideas for z-curve and grim. The 'dev' branch had several changes, including the addition of a zenodo citation, updates to apps and docs, and merges from other branches, specifically 'main' and itself. Additionally, the 'dev' branch was merged into the 'main' branch.

4 commit(s) today:

  • dccb9f4 [main] update module names in vignettes — Lakens
  • 684ccdf [main] Update DESCRIPTION fix #313 — Daniel Lakens
  • 7d7127d [new_modules] fix #313 — Lakens

View all commits →

item.title: docpluck: 11 commits today
item.description:
giladfeldman/docpluck

The `main` branch was the focus of the recent work, where a feature was added to include "optional extraction guardrails for size and timeout". On the same branch, the documentation was updated to "queue investigation for items 3 and 8" and to "sync normalization and benchmark claims with current code", as well as adding a "root README landing page". The `main` branch also saw a refactor to "surface fallback exception classes in method metadata" and the removal of an "orphaned duplicate band re-extractor" in the `extract_columns` section. Additionally, the `main` branch received a feature to "add fallback telemetry counters and optional logging", and a continuous integration change to "add docs-code consistency guard". The documentation on the `main` branch was further updated in an iterative process, including a "2026-06-16 resume handoff + concurrency-collision lesson".

11 commit(s) today:

  • cfe86f7 [main] feat: add optional extraction guardrails for size and timeout — Gilad Feldman
  • aa82a25 [main] docs(todo): queue investigation for items 3 and 8 — Gilad Feldman
  • 617db41 [main] refactor: surface fallback exception classes in method metadata — Gilad Feldman
  • 24aa793 [main] feat: add fallback telemetry counters and optional logging — Gilad Feldman
  • a5da768 [main] ci: add docs-code consistency guard — Gilad Feldman
  • f8594c3 [main] docs: sync normalization and benchmark claims with current code — Gilad Feldman
  • c8800bd [main] docs: add root README landing page — Gilad Feldman
  • 4c55d6e [main] docs(iterate): 2026-06-16 resume handoff + concurrency-collision lesson — Gilad Feldman
  • 436fc5a [main] refactor(extract_columns): remove orphaned duplicate band re-extractor — Gilad Feldman

View all commits →

item.title: regcheck: 2 commits today
item.description:
JamieCummins/regcheck

The staging branch was the focus of the recent work, with updates to specific features. The pdf report handling was updated, as indicated by the commit message "update pdf report handling". The file viewer also received an update, with the commit message stating "update file viewer". Additionally, the model requirements were updated, with the commit message reading "update model reqs". Report viewing was also enhanced, along with some quality of life features, as described in the commit message "improve report viewing + qol features".

2 commit(s) today:

  • 36a2d2b [staging] update pdf report handling — Jamie Cummins
  • 8b7ce6c [staging] update file viewer — Jamie Cummins

View all commits →
